notes: Chunk 70 DONE (Template E, Tier B, 25 new routes), two reciprocal-gap clusters: United Arab Emirates outbound to the 7 unlisted-risk Tier B origins built in chunk 69 (Lebanon, Rwanda, Uganda, Armenia, Georgia, Azerbaijan, Kazakhstan), completing the reverse direction of that corridor; UAE to Dominican Republic and Jamaica (2); UAE to Estonia/Latvia/Lithuania/Slovenia (4, confirmed via web search that the UAE sits in EU Annex II, not the low-risk Annex I, so the titre test and 90-day wait apply in full despite MOCCAE's own lighter export rules). Second cluster: United States/Canada/Australia outbound to Dominican Republic/Jamaica/Panama/Uruguay (12), the first non-EU-origin routes built into these four Latin America/Caribbean destinations, closing a real gap since only EU-origin pairs existed before this chunk. Web-verified per-destination facts: Panama requires a Panamanian consulate/embassy legalisation stamp on the health certificate (a step distinct from the origin country's own export endorsement) plus documented parasite treatment within 14 days, and applies no titre test to any origin; Uruguay requires a dog-only praziquantel-based echinococcus treatment (72 hours to 30 days before arrival) and a mandatory MGAP import permit despite also having no titre test; Jamaica requires a FAVN titre test and a Preliminary Application Form that must be approved by VSD before any vaccination or titre testing begins, a roughly 18-24 week process confirmed independently of the Jamaica-to-EU export routes built in earlier chunks; Dominican Republic needs no import permit for up to 5 personal pets and no titre test from non-high-risk origins. All 25 files verified structurally (YAML valid, requirements blocks are keyed maps) and QA-scanned for zero em dashes and zero banned vocabulary. Next: Chunk 71 (Template A, Tier B).

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
